spider-man.name: Spider-Man
spider-man.description: Peter Parker is a superhero who gains spider-like abilities after being bitten by a radioactive spider. Created by Stan Lee and Steve Ditko, he debuted in 1962 and became one of Marvel Comics' most popular characters.

captain-america.name: Captain America
captain-america.description: Steve Rogers is a super-soldier who has fought for freedom and justice since World War II. Created by Joe Simon and Jack Kirby, he debuted in 1941 and became one of Marvel's greatest hero icons.

daredevil.name: Daredevil
daredevil.description: Matt Murdock is a blind lawyer who, after an accident with radioactive material, had his remaining senses heightened to superhuman levels. Created by Stan Lee and Bill Everett, he debuted in 1964.

hawkeye.name: Hawkeye
hawkeye.description: Clint Barton is an archer and master marksman with no superhuman powers, a longtime member of the Avengers. Created by Stan Lee and Don Heck, he debuted in 1964.

hulk.name: Hulk
hulk.description: Bruce Banner is a scientist who transforms into a green creature of immense strength when enraged, after a gamma radiation accident. Created by Stan Lee and Jack Kirby, he debuted in 1962.

punisher.name: Punisher
punisher.description: Frank Castle is a former Marine who becomes a ruthless vigilante after his family is murdered, fighting crime with lethal methods. Created by Gerry Conway, John Romita Sr., and Ross Andru, he debuted in 1974.

iron-fist.name: Iron Fist
iron-fist.description: Danny Rand is a martial arts master who obtained the mystical power of the Iron Fist in the city of K'un-Lun. Created by Roy Thomas and Gil Kane, he debuted in 1974.

thor.name: Thor
thor.description: The Asgardian god of thunder and son of Odin, wielder of the enchanted hammer Mjolnir. Created by Stan Lee, Larry Lieber, and Jack Kirby, he debuted in 1962.

wolverine.name: Wolverine
wolverine.description: Logan is a mutant with an accelerated healing factor, retractable claws (later coated in adamantium), and heightened senses. Created by Len Wein, John Romita Sr., and Herb Trimpe, he debuted in 1974.

iron-man.name: Iron Man
iron-man.description: Tony Stark is a billionaire engineer who built a technological suit of armor to survive and fight crime. Created by Stan Lee, Larry Lieber, Don Heck, and Jack Kirby, he debuted in 1963.

green-arrow.name: Green Arrow
green-arrow.description: Oliver Queen is a millionaire who becomes a vigilante archer after being stranded on a deserted island. Created by Mort Weisinger and George Papp for DC Comics, he debuted in 1941.

invincible.name: Invincible
invincible.description: Mark Grayson is a teenager who discovers he has the same powers as his father, the hero Omni-Man, and takes up the mantle of Invincible. Created by Robert Kirkman and Cory Walker, he debuted in 2003 through Image Comics.

spawn.name: Spawn
spawn.description: Al Simmons is a murdered mercenary who returns from Hell as a Hellspawn, seeking revenge and redemption. Created by Todd McFarlane, he debuted in 1992 through Image Comics.

tex.name: Tex Willer
tex.description: Tex Willer is a former outlaw who becomes a Texas Ranger and defender of justice in the American Old West, as well as an honorary Navajo chief. Created by Gian Luigi Bonelli and Aurelio Galleppini, he debuted in 1948 in Italy.
